name: Falafel (Nyt)
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
1 slice whole wheat bread, crusts removed
1 tbsp tahini (or olive oil, plus cayenne pepper to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the garbanzo beans through the coarse blade of a meat grinder or in the container of a food processor.
2. Mix the ground beans with remaining ingredients (except the last 6) until well combined. The mixture should be soft.
3. Preheat oven to 365°F.
4. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls, coat them with flour, and fry in batches in hot oil until light brown, about 2 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
5. Serve in halved whole wheat pita bread with chopped onion, tomato, and shredded lettuce.
